mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, correlation_id, retry_count, created_at FROM outbox_events WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND next_attempt_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_events SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE outbox_events SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_attempt_at = TIMESTAMPADD(SECOND, #{delaySeconds}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)), last_error = LEFT(#{lastError}, 512) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO consumer_inbox (consumer_name, event_id) VALUES (#{consumerName}, #{eventId})
